section.div: Configure this plugin with repositories you want to feature!
An AI-powered security review GitHub Action using Claude to analyze code changes for security vulnerabilities.
Run Claude Code against any AI provider. DeepSeek, Groq, Ollama, OpenRouter — your call.

A Claude Code skill bundle for bug hunting and external red-team work - 51 skills, 15 slash commands, 681 disclosed-report patterns curated across 24 vulnerability classes, plus enterprise identity + infrastructure attack matrices.
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
PentestAgent is an AI agent framework for black-box security testing, supporting bug bounty, red-team, and penetration testing workflows.
AI-powered bug bounty hunting from your terminal - recon, 20 vuln classes, autonomous hunting, and report generation. All inside Claude Code.

footer.span: These metrics do not include all private contributions
